title: Director, Business Development, Industrial
description:
The Director of Business Development is to support the overall growth in Asia working closely with the Senior Vice President and the Asia Leadership team to expand the AtkinsRéalis current presence in the Industrial and Project & Program Services (PPS) markets as well as Singapore as the regional hub to achieve the Vision 35 strategic plan.

The role is responsible for leading and executing business development strategies across the Industrial and Project & Program Services (PPS) sectors in Asia. The role encompasses client relationship management, marketing and communications, BD team leadership, performance reporting, and strategic growth planning. In addition to current responsibilities, the role includes oversight of business development across all sectors in Singapore, with a focus on cross-sector collaboration and cross-selling initiatives.

Key Responsibilities:

Strategic Planning & Execution

· Develop and implement regional business development strategies for Industrial and PPS sectors.

· Lead cross-sector BD efforts in Singapore, promoting integrated service offerings and cross-sales.

· Identify and pursue strategic growth opportunities across Asia.

Client Relationship Management

· Maintain and expand relationships with key clients and stakeholders.

· Ensure client satisfaction through proactive engagement and strategic alignment.

· Support account retention and growth initiatives.

Marketing & Communications

· Collaborate with marketing teams to develop sector-specific campaigns and materials.

· Represent the company at industry events, conferences, and client engagements.

· Ensure consistent brand messaging across regions and sectors.

Team Leadership & Collaboration

· Lead and manage the Asia BD team, fostering a collaborative and high-performance culture.

· Promote cross-sector coordination, particularly in Singapore.

· Work closely with sector leads, country managers, and global BD teams to align efforts.

Reporting & Performance Management

· Track and report on BD performance metrics, pipeline development, and conversion rates.

· Provide regular updates to senior leadership on market trends and strategic initiatives.

· Use data-driven insights to refine BD strategies and improve outcomes.

Qualifications:

· Extensive experience in business development, preferably within Industrial and PPS sectors.

· Strong understanding of the Asia market and client dynamics.

· Proven success in cross-sector and cross-regional BD leadership.

· Excellent communication, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills.

· Demonstrated ability to lead diverse teams and drive strategic initiatives.

Preferred Attributes:

· Strong client orientation and commercial acumen.

· Strategic and analytical mindset.

· Collaborative leadership style.

· Adaptability in a dynamic, multi-cultural environment.

postedCompany.description:
Our company Faithful and Gould (www.fgould.com) is an integrated project and programme management consultancy. It supports clients with the management of their construction projects and programmes of varying types of projects, with offices across Asia, Europe, the Americas, the Middle East, Subcontinent and Australia. Our office locations are complemented by those of our Parent group AtkinsRéalis enabling us to draw on an international knowledge base in delivering the next project to our large and extensive client base. In Faithful+Gould, we are providing more than just a job, we believe we can offer an exciting change of professional lifestyle and career development.

From our Singapore office we currently provide a range of project management services to International Corporations and Government entities including the following:

  • Strategic Project Definition and Advisory Services;
  • Client Representative Services;
  • Due Diligence studies;
  • Cost and Budget;
  • Planning and Programme Management;
  • Project Management;
  • Move Management;
  • Design Management;
  • Procurement Management;
  • Construction Management;
postedCompany.name: ATKINSREALIS SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
